name: wear_armor
description: Equip armor from the specified inventory slot
parameters: z.object({ slot: z.number().int().describe("The inventory slot index of the armor item to equip (e.g., 39 for a chestplate in initial survival inventory)"), destination: z.enum(["head", "torso", "legs", "feet"]).optional().describe("Specific armor slot to use. If omitted, the bot will attempt to infer it from the item name.") })

name: eat_bread
description: Consume bread to restore health and saturation
parameters: z.object({ count: z.number().int().min(1).max(10).default(1).describe("Maximum number of bread pieces to consume."), stopIfFull: z.boolean().default(true).describe("Whether to stop eating once the food bar reaches 20.") })

name: kite_nearest_hostile
description: Back away from the nearest hostile while keeping distance and swinging stone sword
parameters: z.object({ maxDurationMs: z.number().int().min(1000).max(60000).default(5000).describe("Total active milliseconds to run the kiting behavior"), preferredDistance: z.number().min(2).max(10).default(6).describe("The distance the bot tries to maintain from the hostile"), retreatBlocks: z.number().min(1).max(10).default(4).describe("How far to calculate a retreat position when the target gets too close"), weaponName: z.string().default("stone_sword").describe("The item name to use for attacking while kiting") })

name: build_defensive_pillar
description: Build a 3-block high pillar under myself using available planks to escape melee range when multiple hostiles are nearby
parameters: z.object({ height: z.number().int().min(1).max(10).default(3).describe("Total number of blocks to stack under the bot"), material: z.string().describe("The name or display name of the block to use for pillaring, e.g., 'oak_planks' or 'stone'"), maxDurationMs: z.number().int().min(1000).max(30000).default(10000).describe("Maximum time in milliseconds to spend building the pillar") })

name: safety_retreat
description: Move 20 blocks away from all hostile mobs to escape danger when health is critical
parameters: z.object({ distanceBlocks: z.number().int().min(5).max(64).default(20).describe("Minimum distance in blocks to put between the bot and the nearest hostile mob"), searchRadius: z.number().int().min(10).max(100).default(30).describe("Radius to search for hostile threats"), healthThreshold: z.number().int().min(1).max(20).default(20).describe("If health is above this, the bot may treat the situation as non-critical; set to 20 to always retreat when called"), maxDurationMs: z.number().int().min(1000).max(60000).default(15000).describe("Maximum time to spend retreating before stopping") })

name: melee_attack
description: Attack the nearest hostile mob with the equipped weapon
parameters: z.object({ hostileEntityId: z.union([z.number().int(), z.string().min(1)]).describe("The entity ID of the hostile mob to attack as seen in the snapshot"), weaponName: z.string().optional().describe("Optional name of the preferred weapon to use, like 'stone_sword'. If not provided, will look for 'sword' or use what is in hand."), maxDurationMs: z.number().int().min(1000).max(120000).default(30000).describe("The maximum active game time in milliseconds to engage in the fight before stopping") })
